mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, user_id, request_id, payment_amount, payment_status, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM t_payment_order WHERE id = #{paymentId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, order_id, user_id, request_id, payment_amount, payment_status, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM t_payment_order WHERE request_id = #{requestId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, order_id, user_id, request_id, payment_amount, payment_status, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM t_payment_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payment_order ( id, order_id, user_id, request_id, payment_amount, payment_status, fail_reason ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{requestId}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentStatus}, #{failReason} )
